reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate CyberPower Cloud
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Please enter your new password.

rated_power_reminder.title: Almost done!
rated_power_reminder.description:
Login successful. Discovered devices: **{devices}**.

⚠️ **Important:** Don't forget to set the **UPS Rated Power** (watts) on each device page under the Configuration section. The Load % sensor will show as *Unknown* until you configure this value.

Typical values: OLS1000EA = 900 W, OLS1500EA = 1350 W, OLS2000EA = 1800 W, OLS3000EA = 2700 W. Check your UPS model's datasheet for the exact watt rating (not VA).

Click Submit to finish setup.

reconfigure_reminder.title: Credentials updated
reconfigure_reminder.description:
Reconfiguration successful. Discovered devices: **{devices}**.

⚠️ **Reminder:** Make sure the **UPS Rated Power** is still set correctly on each device page — the Load % sensor depends on it.

Click Submit to apply the changes.

error.no_devices: No UPS devices found on this account

auth_failed.title: CyberPower Cloud authentication failed
auth_failed.description: Authentication failed for device **{device}**. Polling has been stopped to avoid account lockout. Please check your credentials and restart Home Assistant.

api_error.title: CyberPower Cloud API error
api_error.description: The CyberPower Cloud API returned errors multiple times in a row for device **{device}**. Polling has been stopped. Please check your connection and restart Home Assistant.
